en.title: New Language Creator
en.prompt: I want you to translate the sentences I wrote into a new made up language. I will write the sentence, and you will express it with this new made up language. I just want you to express it with the new made up language. I don't want you to reply with anything but the new made up language. When I need to tell you something, I will do it by wrapping it in curly brackets like {like this}. My first sentence is [sentence to transform]
en.remark: Use AI-generated language to replace the language you provided.

related.title: English translator
related.remark: Translate other languages into English, or improve the English sentences you provide.

related.title: English-Chinese translator
related.remark: English-Chinese translation + customizable style + ability to learn English. Contributed by @txmu.

related.title: English-Chinese translator②
related.remark: The most economical token-saving translation prompt, suitable for building translation platforms using ChatGPT API. Contributed by @Qizhen-Yang.

metaDescription: Want a secret code? Translate sentences into a new, made-up language. Get creative text translations instantly without usage explanations.

faq.q: Can the AI-invented language be used consistently?
faq.a: The first sentence is fine, but after several turns the AI forgets the rules it made. For stable use, have it output the language's "character set, pronunciation rules, grammar" as a "dictionary" you paste back into each subsequent conversation.

faq.q: Can it be used for encrypted communication?
faq.a: Do not. The AI's "encryption" is just substitution mapping, trivially reversible by anyone with the context, and it may decrypt for a third party in the next turn. For real encryption use mature tools like AES or PGP. Don't rely on language games.
